mapper.insert: insert into alarm_cid_index (alarm_cid, alarm_id, alarm_beginTime, alarm_endTime, table_suffix, device_sn, irms_sn, alarm_type, route_status, delete_after, created_time, updated_time) values (#{alarmCid}, #{alarmId}, #{alarmBegintime}, #{alarmEndtime}, #{tableSuffix}, #{deviceSn}, #{irmsSn}, #{alarmType}, 'ACTIVE', null, now(), now()) on duplicate key update alarm_id = values(alarm_id), alarm_beginTime = values(alarm_beginTime), alarm_endTime = values(alarm_endTime), table_suffix = values(table_suffix), device_sn = values(device_sn), irms_sn = values(irms_sn), alarm_type = values(alarm_type), route_status = 'ACTIVE', delete_after = null, updated_time = now()

insert into alarm_cid_stale_index (alarm_cid, alarm_id, alarm_beginTime, alarm_endTime, table_suffix, device_sn, irms_sn, alarm_type, route_status, stale_time, expire_time, delete_after, created_time, updated_time) values (#{alarmCid}, #{alarmId}, #{alarmBegintime}, #{alarmEndtime}, #{tableSuffix}, #{deviceSn}, #{irmsSn}, #{alarmType}, 'ACTIVE', #{staleTime}, #{expireTime}, null, now(), now()) on duplicate key update alarm_id = values(alarm_id), alarm_beginTime = values(alarm_beginTime), alarm_endTime = values(alarm_endTime), table_suffix = values(table_suffix), device_sn = values(device_sn), irms_sn = values(irms_sn), alarm_type = values(alarm_type), route_status = 'ACTIVE', expire_time = values(expire_time), delete_after = null, updated_time = now()
mapper.select: select h.*, 'HOT' as index_source from alarm_cid_index h where h.alarm_cid = #{alarmCid} limit 1
select s.*, 'STALE' as index_source from alarm_cid_stale_index s where s.alarm_cid = #{alarmCid} limit 1

select h.*, 'HOT' as index_source from alarm_cid_index h where h.device_sn = #{deviceSn} and h.route_status = 'ACTIVE'
and (h.alarm_type is null or h.alarm_type != #{excludeAlarmType})

select s.*, 'STALE' as index_source from alarm_cid_stale_index s where s.device_sn = #{deviceSn} and s.route_status = 'ACTIVE'
and (s.alarm_type is null or s.alarm_type != #{excludeAlarmType})
select h.*, 'HOT' as index_source from alarm_cid_index h where h.irms_sn = #{irmsSn} and h.route_status = 'ACTIVE'
select s.*, 'STALE' as index_source from alarm_cid_stale_index s where s.irms_sn = #{irmsSn} and s.route_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update alarm_cid_index set route_status = 'CLOSED', alarm_endTime = #{alarmEndtime}, delete_after = #{deleteAfter}, updated_time = now() where alarm_id = #{alarmId}
update alarm_cid_stale_index set route_status = 'CLOSED', alarm_endTime = #{alarmEndtime}, delete_after = #{deleteAfter}, updated_time = now() where alarm_id = #{alarmId}
